independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)

criteria_verification.evidence: Created tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py with 24 tests across 8 test classes plus a seam test class. File compiles and all tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Created tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py with 24 tests across 8 test classes plus a seam test class. File compiles and all tests pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `text` valid values match `TEXT_VALUES` in validator.py
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTextValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md text values vs TEXT_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.text Literal vs TEXT_VALUES consistency. All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestTextValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md text values vs TEXT_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.text Literal vs TEXT_VALUES consistency. All pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `topic` valid values match `TOPIC_VALUES` in validator.py
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTopicValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md topic values vs TOPIC_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.topic Literal vs TOPIC_VALUES consistency. All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestTopicValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md topic values vs TOPIC_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.topic Literal vs TOPIC_VALUES consistency. All pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `ao` valid values match `AO_PATTERN` (AO1-AO6)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestAoValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: GOAL.md ao values are exactly AO1-AO6, AO_PATTERN accepts all 6 codes, AO_PATTERN rejects AO7+. All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestAoValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: GOAL.md ao values are exactly AO1-AO6, AO_PATTERN accepts all 6 codes, AO_PATTERN rejects AO7+. All pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `grade_target` range matches validator (4-9 + null)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGradeTargetConsistency class has 4 tests: GOAL.md lists 4-9 and null, Metadata validator accepts 4-9, accepts None, rejects grades outside range (0, 1, 2, 3, 10, 11, -1). All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestGradeTargetConsistency class has 4 tests: GOAL.md lists 4-9 and null, Metadata validator accepts 4-9, accepts None, rejects grades outside range (0, 1, 2, 3, 10, 11, -1). All pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `layer` values match Metadata.layer Literal type
criteria_verification.evidence: TestLayerValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md layer valid values (behaviour, knowledge) and compares against Metadata.layer Literal args using _get_literal_args helper. Exact match verified. Passes.
criteria_verification.notes: TestLayerValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md layer valid values (behaviour, knowledge) and compares against Metadata.layer Literal args using _get_literal_args helper. Exact match verified. Passes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md `type` values match Metadata.type Literal type
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTypeValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md type valid values (reasoning, direct) and compares against Metadata.type Literal args. Exact match verified. Passes.
criteria_verification.notes: TestTypeValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md type valid values (reasoning, direct) and compares against Metadata.type Literal args. Exact match verified. Passes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies all generation target categories appear in metadata topic valid values
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGenerationTargetTopicConsistency has 2 tests: (1) maps all 7 Generation Targets categories to topic values via _CATEGORY_TO_TOPIC dict and verifies each appears in GOAL.md topic valid values, (2) verifies all mapped topics exist in validator.py TOPIC_VALUES. All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestGenerationTargetTopicConsistency has 2 tests: (1) maps all 7 Generation Targets categories to topic values via _CATEGORY_TO_TOPIC dict and verifies each appears in GOAL.md topic valid values, (2) verifies all mapped topics exist in validator.py TOPIC_VALUES. All pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies all evaluation criterion names are valid Python identifiers (match `^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$`)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestEvaluationCriterionIdentifiers has 2 tests: (1) regex match against ^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$ for all criterion names, (2) explicit hyphen check. All 5 criteria pass (socratic_approach, ao_accuracy, mark_scheme_aligned, age_appropriate, factual_accuracy).
criteria_verification.notes: TestEvaluationCriterionIdentifiers has 2 tests: (1) regex match against ^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$ for all criterion names, (2) explicit hyphen check. All 5 criteria pass (socratic_approach, ao_accuracy, mark_scheme_aligned, age_appropriate, factual_accuracy).

Budget: 2404/5200 tokens

- IS_PARAM_TYPE_OF

- SOURCE_METADATA_SOURCE
- USES_FOR_DUPLICATE_PREVENTION
- HAS_TASK_ID_FORMAT

### ⚠️ Warnings
- APPLIES_TO
- HAS_ROOT_CAUSE
- HAS_ROOT_CAUSE

### 🎭 Role Constraints

- ASKS_BEFORE_APPROVING_WITH_FAILING_TESTS
- MUST_CREATE_CRITERIA_VERIFICATION_ENTRIES

- STATE_PERSISTED_USING
- AVOIDED_OUTCOME
